calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: David Wade appeared via zoom for Allan Bier (petitioner).

Discussion was held in regard to cash assets should be fully insured, and that cash assets over $250,000.00 can be placed into a sweep account. First and final report and petition etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
